positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with their session established
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify the authenticated user's name or profile indicator is visible on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All login page UI elements are correctly rendered and accessible
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page title or heading is displayed
Verify the username/email input field is present and visible
Verify the password input field is present and visible
Verify the password field masks input characters
Verify the 'Login' / 'Submit' button is present and enabled
Verify any 'Forgot Password' or registration links are visible if applicable
positive_scenarios.title: Login page UI elements are rendered correctly

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh and the user remains authenticated on the dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard/home page content is still displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful as email comparison is case-insensitive; user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'TestD1051@Gmail.COM' (mixed case version of the valid email) in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully authenticated
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with username containing mixed case letters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and protected pages are no longer accessible without re-authentication
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Locate and click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button or menu option
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify that navigating to the dashboard URL without logging in redirects back to the login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and appropriate validation error messages are displayed for both empty fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message such as 'Username is required' or 'Please fill in all fields' is displayed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is denied and a generic error message indicating invalid credentials is displayed without revealing which field is incorrect
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message such as 'Invalid username or password' or 'Incorrect credentials' is displayed
Verify the password field is cleared or remains editable
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is denied with a generic error message; the system does not reveal whether the email is registered or not
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistent_user_xyz@fake.com' in the username/email field
Enter any password, e.g. 'SomePassword@99', in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message such as 'Invalid username or password' is displayed
Verify no sensitive information about account existence is revealed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with non-existent / unregistered email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message is displayed indicating that the password field is required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message such as 'Password is required' or 'Please enter your password' is displayed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password and valid username

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a format validation error is shown indicating the email address format is invalid
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'invalidemail@@nodomain' in the username/email field
Enter any password, e.g. 'TestPass@123', in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message such as 'Please enter a valid email address' or 'Invalid email format' is displayed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application safely handles the SQL injection attempt, denies login, and does not expose any system or database information
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the username/email field
Enter any password, e.g. 'TestPass@123', in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message is displayed and no unauthorized access is granted
Verify no application error or stack trace is exposed to the user
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application gracefully handles excessively long input by either restricting character entry or displaying a validation error, without crashing
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a string of 300 characters (e.g. 'a' repeated 291 times followed by '@test.com') in the username/email field
Enter any password, e.g. 'TestPass@123', in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed or the field limits input to a maximum allowed length
Verify the application does not crash or expose a server error
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with excessively long username input (boundary value)
